intent.content: When a context has a significantly high speed, the rate of heading change between it and the previous context is bounded.
intent.goal: Detect physically impossible heading changes at high speed.
intent.design_rationale: At high speed, a vehicle cannot turn sharply within a short time interval; a large heading change rate at high speed indicates a GPS anomaly or data error rather than actual vehicle behavior.

semantics: For any context v1, if the speed recorded in v1 is significantly higher than a certain threshold, then the ratio of the absolute heading difference between v1 and its previous context v2 to the timestamp difference between v1 and v2 does not exceed a certain upper bound.
